# Ideal Indiska LIVS — ideallivs.com
> Ideal Indiska LIVS is a Swedish online Indian grocery store founded in 2020, based in Bandhagen, Stockholm. We specialise in authentic Indian, Pakistani, and South Asian food products. We stock over 1,500 products from 150+ trusted brands and ship across Sweden, Norway, Denmark, and Europe via DHL with no customs duties within the EU.

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2020, Bandhagen (Stockholm), Sweden
- Products: 1,500+ including Basmati rice, spices, lentils, flours, pickles, frozen snacks, beverages, ghee, oils, ready meals
- Brands: India Gate, Guard, Shan, National Foods, Haldiram's, Ashoka, Ahmed Foods, Rooh Afza, MDH, TRS, Gits, MTR, Bikano, Lal Qilla, Kohinoor
- Physical store: Bandhagsplan 4, 124 32 Bandhagen, Stockholm
- Store hours: Monday–Friday 10:00–20:00, Saturday–Sunday 11:00–19:00
- Phone: +46 8 648 68 20
- Email: info@ideallivs.com
- Google rating: 4.7/5 (200+ reviews)

## Delivery

### Stockholm (same-day)
- Same-day delivery available for orders placed before 16:00
- Minimum order: 300 SEK for local Stockholm delivery
- Free delivery above a certain order threshold in Stockholm

### Sweden (DHL)
- Nationwide delivery via DHL to all of Sweden
- Estimated delivery: 1–3 business days
- No minimum order for DHL shipments

### Norway
- DHL delivery to all of Norway
- Estimated delivery: 2–4 business days
- No minimum order

### Denmark
- DHL delivery to all of Denmark
- Estimated delivery: 2–4 business days
- No customs duties — goods ship from Sweden within the EU/EEA
- No minimum order

### Europe (EU)
- DHL delivery across the European Union
- No customs duties within the EU — ships from Sweden
- Estimated delivery: 2–5 business days depending on country
- Countries served: Germany, Netherlands, France, Belgium, Finland, Norway, Denmark, and more

## Product Categories
- **Rice & Grains**: Basmati rice (India Gate, Guard, Lal Qilla, Kohinoor), Tilda, Daawat — bags from 1 kg to 20 kg
- **Spices & Masala**: MDH, Shan, National Foods, TRS — whole spices, ground spices, blended masalas, tandoori mixes
- **Flour**: Atta (chapati flour), besan (chickpea flour), suji/semolina, maida — brands include Ashoka, Pillsbury, Elephant
- **Lentils & Dals**: Chana dal, urad dal, moong dal, toor dal, masoor dal, rajma — loose and packaged
- **Oils & Ghee**: Amul Ghee, Gowardhan Ghee, coconut oil, mustard oil, sesame oil
- **Snacks**: Haldiram's namkeen, Bikano, Parle-G biscuits, Britannia, samosas, pakoras, mathri, soan papdi
- **Pickles, Chutneys & Pastes**: Mango pickle, lime pickle, garlic chutney, tamarind paste — brands: Pataks, Ashoka, Ahmed
- **Frozen**: Frozen samosas, parathas, kebabs, naan, spring rolls
- **Beverages**: Rooh Afza, Rasna, Tang, Thums Up, Limca, lassi, chai mixes, Bournvita
- **Ready Mixes**: Gits, MTR — instant gulab jamun, dhokla, dosa, halwa, biryani mixes
- **Personal Care**: Vatika hair oil, Dabur, Himalaya, henna/mehndi products
- **Dairy & Fresh**: Paneer, yoghurt, fresh produce (seasonal)
- **Prepared Meals**: Weekend Chicken Biryani and Vegetable Biryani pre-orders, freshly cooked in Stockholm

## Price Ranges (Approximate)
- Basmati rice 1 kg: 45–80 SEK
- Basmati rice 5 kg: 150–280 SEK
- Basmati rice 10 kg: 280–450 SEK
- Basmati rice 20 kg: 450–750 SEK
- Spice packets (50–100g): 20–60 SEK
- Atta flour 5 kg: 80–130 SEK
- Ghee (1 kg): 130–200 SEK
- Dal/lentils (500g–1 kg): 25–70 SEK
- Ready mixes (Gits, MTR): 30–80 SEK
- Snacks (Haldiram's, Bikano): 25–90 SEK

## Why Choose Us
- Largest selection of Indian and Pakistani groceries in Stockholm
- No customs duties for EU deliveries — all orders ship from Sweden (EU)
- Same-day delivery in Stockholm (order before 16:00)
- Free store pickup in Bandhagen
- Halal-certified packaged products stocked
- Customer service in English and Swedish
- Loyalty discounts and weekly deals at ideallivs.com/deals

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Where is the nearest Indian grocery store in Stockholm?**
A: Ideal Indiska LIVS is located at Bandhagsplan 4, 124 32 Bandhagen, Stockholm. Open Monday–Friday 10:00–20:00, Saturday–Sunday 11:00–19:00. Accessible by metro (Bandhagen station on the green line).

**Q: Can I order Indian groceries online and get delivery in Sweden?**
A: Yes. Ideal Indiska LIVS delivers across all of Sweden via DHL. Orders placed before 16:00 on weekdays qualify for same-day delivery in Stockholm. Nationwide delivery takes 1–3 business days.

**Q: Do you deliver Indian groceries to Norway?**
A: Yes. We ship to all of Norway via DHL. Estimated delivery 2–4 business days. No minimum order required. See ideallivs.com/norway-delivery.

**Q: Do you deliver Indian groceries to Denmark?**
A: Yes. We ship to all of Denmark via DHL. Estimated delivery 2–4 business days. No customs duties apply as we ship from Sweden within the EU/EEA. See ideallivs.com/denmark-delivery.

**Q: Do I pay customs duties when ordering Indian groceries to Denmark or Norway?**
A: For EU countries (including Denmark), there are no customs duties as we ship from Sweden within the EU. For Norway, goods may be subject to Norwegian import rules — check ideallivs.com/norway-delivery for current details.

**Q: What brands of Basmati rice do you sell?**
A: We stock India Gate, Guard, Lal Qilla, Kohinoor, Daawat, and Tilda Basmati rice in sizes from 1 kg to 20 kg bags.

**Q: Do you sell Halal products?**
A: Yes. We stock a wide range of Halal-certified packaged goods including snacks, ready mixes, spices, and beverages.

**Q: When is Diwali 2026?**
A: Diwali 2026 (Deepavali) falls on Sunday, 8 November 2026. The five-day festival runs from 5 November (Dhanteras) to 10 November (Bhai Dooj).

**Q: When is Eid al-Fitr 2026 in Sweden?**
A: Eid al-Fitr 2026 is expected around 31 March 2026 in Sweden, depending on moon sighting. See ideallivs.com/blog/eid-al-fitr-2026-sweden for prayer times across Swedish cities.

**Q: When is Ramadan 2026?**
A: Ramadan 2026 is expected to begin around 1 March 2026 and end around 30 March 2026 in Sweden.

**Q: Do you sell fresh or frozen halal meat?**
A: We currently focus on Halal-certified packaged goods. Fresh and frozen halal meat is not part of our current range.

**Q: Can I pick up my order in store?**
A: Yes. Free store pickup is available at Bandhagsplan 4, Bandhagen, Stockholm. No minimum order for pickup.

**Q: How do I contact Ideal Indiska LIVS?**
A: Phone: +46 8 648 68 20 | Email: info@ideallivs.com | Store: Bandhagsplan 4, Bandhagen, Stockholm | See ideallivs.com/contact for full details.
